name: Manual task judgment rule capture
definitionOfDone: User UI rules page shows a 手動加入任務判斷規則 form below rule tables
SevenAM control API writes new rules to SEVEN_JUDGMENT_RULES_DATA_SOURCE_ID
HOZO AM control API writes new rules to HOZO_JUDGMENT_RULES_DATA_SOURCE_ID
User UI Basic auth or project control auth protects the write endpoint
Generated SevenAM and HOZO AM User UI files include the manual rule form
Project manifests and upgrade records are updated separately
